title: The Problem Solvers | Max Junestrand at Legora
summary: Legora is an AI-native operating system enabling legal teams to autonomously plan, execute, review, and complete complex legal work end-to-end. The platform leverages Claude to modernize traditional legal interpretation work that has remained largely unchanged by prior technology advances.
